---
title: "personas.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\.agents\scripts\personas.py"
loc: 160
complexity: 25
logic_score: 0.50
style_score: 3.92
intel_score: 7.40
overall_score: 2.61
---

## Intent
The `personas.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on PersonaStrategy, __init__, enforce_policy, get_voice, retheme_docs, _quarantine, _sync_configs, OdinStrategy, get_voice, retheme_docs, _res, enforce_policy, _create_cursor_rules, _create_standard_agents, AlfredStrategy, get_voice, enforce_policy, _create_cursor_rules, _create_minimal_agents, get_strategy. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via PersonaStrategy, __init__, enforce_policy, get_voice, retheme_docs, _quarantine, _sync_configs, OdinStrategy, get_voice, retheme_docs, _res, enforce_policy, _create_cursor_rules, _create_standard_agents, AlfredStrategy, get_voice, enforce_policy, _create_cursor_rules, _create_minimal_agents, get_strategy. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [shutil](file://shutil)
- [datetime](file://datetime)
- [json](file://json)

### Exports
- `PersonaStrategy`
- `__init__`
- `enforce_policy`
- `get_voice`
- `retheme_docs`
- `_quarantine`
- `_sync_configs`
- `OdinStrategy`
- `get_voice`
- `retheme_docs`
- `_res`
- `enforce_policy`
- `_create_cursor_rules`
- `_create_standard_agents`
- `AlfredStrategy`
- `get_voice`
- `enforce_policy`
- `_create_cursor_rules`
- `_create_minimal_agents`
- `get_strategy`
